ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "sku" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., simple, configurable) */,
  "attribute_set_code" TEXT /* Attribute set code defining the product attributes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the product belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sku")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_views" (
  "store_view_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each store view */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store view */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the store view */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the store view */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Locale (language and region) of the store view */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the store view was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the store view was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_view_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_prices" (
  "sku" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "store_view_code" TEXT /* Reference to the store view where the price is applicable */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product in the specified store view */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the price was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the price was last updated */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage applicable to the product in the store view */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to the product in the store view */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sku", "store_view_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom option */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Reference to the product SKU the option is associated with */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom option */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of the custom option (e.g., field, dropdown) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the custom option */,
  "price_adjustment" REAL /* Price adjustment (positive or negative) for selecting this option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the custom option was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the custom option was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_options_sku FOREIGN KEY ("sku") REFERENCES products ("sku")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_custom_options" (
  "sku" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the custom option ID associated with the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sku", "option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "sku" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "store_view_code" TEXT /* Reference to the store view where the inventory is applicable */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock in the specified store view */,
  "low_stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold below which the inventory is considered low */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the inventory should be reordered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sku", "store_view_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the order */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Reference to the product SKU in the order */,
  "store_view_code" TEXT /* Reference to the store view where the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, completed) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_store_view_code FOREIGN KEY ("store_view_code") REFERENCES store_views ("store_view_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_sku FOREIGN KEY ("sku") REFERENCES products ("sku"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the custom option ID selected for the order */,
  "option_value" TEXT /* Value selected for the custom option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order detail was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "option_id")
)
